search_document:
User Request: Dashboard.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Monthly Revenue
Type: chart
Description: Monthly revenue trend
Title: Top Customer Regions
Type: table
Description: Regions with highest customer counts
Title: Total Revenue
Type: kpi
Description: Overall revenue
Title: Product Performance
Type: chart
Description: Sales performance by product category
Title: Order Status Overview
Type: chart
Description: Distribution of orders by status
Title: Employee Performance
Type: table
Description: Sales performance by employee

sql_queries.title: Monthly Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Top Customer Regions
sql_queries.sql: SELECT Region, COUNT(*) AS CustomerCount FROM Customers GROUP BY Region ORDER BY CustomerCount DESC

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM "Order Details" od

sql_queries.title: Product Performance
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM "Order Details" od JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID JOIN Categories c ON p.CategoryID = c.CategoryID GROUP BY c.CategoryName ORDER BY Revenue DESC

sql_queries.title: Order Status Overview
sql_queries.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN ShippedDate IS NOT NULL THEN 'Shipped' WHEN RequiredDate < date('now') THEN 'Overdue' ELSE 'Pending' END AS OrderStatus, COUNT(*) AS OrderCount FROM Orders GROUP BY OrderStatus

sql_queries.title: Employee Performance
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.EmployeeID, e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS EmployeeName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID JOIN Employees e ON o.EmployeeID = e.EmployeeID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID ORDER BY Revenue DESC
